title: Ericoides pusillum
taxonomy: Ericoides pusillum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It belongs to the genus Ericoides, which is a group of plants that share similar characteristics. The family Gentianaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Ericoides pusillum is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification is further supported by its unique morphology and phylogenetic analysis.
